chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-600 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1) For orders on M.A No.5051/25 (urgency). 2) For orders on office objections. 3) For orders on M.A No.5052/25. 4) For hearing of main case. 30.05.2025. Mr. Muhammad Ali Akbar, Advocate for applicant/accused. *_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_* Through this Cr. Bail Application, applicant Muhammad Asad s/o Ali Nawaz seeks protective bail in Crime No.15 of 2025 U/s 4/5/23 PER Act 1947 registered at PS FIA SBC, Karachi. Through counsel, the applicant/accused is seeking a protective bail in this matter, wherein the learned counsel for applicant/accused shows apprehension that two of the co- accused have been arrested in this matter, hence the applicant/accused also has apprehension of his arrest as police is raiding at his residence at Karachi. The learned counsel further submits that the case is of FIA and the present applicant/accused wants to surrender himself and join the investigation, however, in the present circumstances, he apprehends his arrest. Without touching merits/demerits of the case, protective bail for a period of Fifteen days from today is granted to the applicant/accused, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- (Rupees One Lac only) and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of Fifteen days or when the applicant surrender before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier and during such period the N.B.Ws, if any, issued by the Trial Court shall remain suspended.

Without touching merits/demerits of the case, protective bail for a period of Fifteen days from today is granted to the applicant/accused, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- (Rupees One Lac only) and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of Fifteen days or when the applicant surrender before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier and during such period the N.B.Ws, if any, issued by the Trial Court shall remain suspended. In case applicant fails to appear/surrender before the concerned Court within the stipulated period, the surety furnished by him before this court shall automatically stand forfeited. This Cr. Bail Application along with pending applications stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ali.
